svg.title: Lookup screen
svg.desc: The primary search interface where staff run name searches (with partial surname matching), reservation-number lookups, date searches (including mode choices), and the all-fields query action.

g.text: Find a guest or reservation. Check in 4:00pm · Check out 11am.
Type a few letters — e.g. "pal" finds Palmer.
Office use only · Air-gapped — no guest-facing data leaves this machine.
